ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "race" TEXT /* Patient's race */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "medical_allergies" TEXT /* Medical allergies */,
  "preferred_communication_method" TEXT /* Preferred communication method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or management plan */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Treatment outcome */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Complications or side effects */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Diagnosis code (ICD-10 or SNOMED-CT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of medication */,
  "dosage_instructions" TEXT /* Additional dosage instructions */,
  "potential_interactions" TEXT /* Potential interactions or side effects */,
  "medication_code" TEXT /* Medication code (RxNorm or NDC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or diagnosis */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Treatment goals */,
  "interventions" TEXT /* Interventions or therapies */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Treatment outcome */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the lab test was performed */,
  "lab_test_code" TEXT /* Lab test code (LOINC) */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the lab test */,
  "abnormal_flag" INTEGER /* Abnormal flag (true/false) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lab result (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_imaging" (
  "medical_imaging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical imaging report */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of medical imaging exam (e.g., X-ray, MRI) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the medical imaging exam */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the medical imaging exam was performed */,
  "modality" TEXT /* Imaging modality (e.g., X-ray, MRI) */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Body part imaged */,
  "procedure_code" TEXT /* Procedure code (CPT or HCPCS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the imaging report (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_imaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_imaging_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "vital_sign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "weight" REAL /* Patient weight */,
  "pulse" INTEGER /* Pulse rate */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate */,
  "oxygen_saturation" INTEGER /* Oxygen saturation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the vital signs were recorded */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Measurement method (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_portal" (
  "patient_portal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient portal entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the patient */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the patient */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, phone, mail) */,
  "accessibility_options" TEXT /* Accessibility options (e.g., font size, color scheme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_portal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_portal_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "secure_messages" (
  "secure_message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each secure message */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the message (e.g., high, low) */,
  "reply_history" TEXT /* Reply history (e.g., thread of messages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("secure_message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_secure_messages_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_secure_messages_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_resources" (
  "educational_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational resource */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational resource */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL of the educational resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of educational resource (e.g., document, video) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the educational resource (e.g., PDF, MP4) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the educational resource */,
  "ratings" TEXT /* Ratings or reviews of the educational resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educational_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_resources_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of service */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Code of the service (e.g., CPT, HCPCS) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount billed */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
